news.headline: Fed’s Williams: There are no signs of inflation expectations becoming unmoored.
SVTA held its first quarterly meeting in Tucson, AZ in 2025, focusing on high-quality video solutions.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, the Streaming Video Technology Alliance (SVTA) recently held its Q1, 2025 Member Meeting in Tucson, Arizona. This global technical association focuses on developing solutions to meet technical challenges in providing high-quality video experiences at scale. The event spanned two and a half days and was exclusive to members. It included a range of working group sessions, industry presentations, and a networking event in the evening. Additional information about the meeting's agenda and specifics can be accessed through the provided link.

news.headline: Crypto summit by Trump admin won't address taxes, aims to reverse Biden's crypto crackdown & position Bitcoin as digital gold vault.
news.summary: The Trump administration is seeking to reverse Joe Biden's cryptocurrency policies, positioning Bitcoin as a "digital Fort Knox" for digital gold.

news.headline: BCYF Grantee AZIZA PE&CE empowers youth through fashion, art, and advocacy at the STRUT Showcase in Baltimore.
news.summary: A major event named STRUT XII: I'm On A New Level, supported by the Baltimore Children & Youth Fund (BCYF), is set to be held in Baltimore on March 7, 2025. Organized by AZIZA PE&CE, the event aims to display youth creativity, raise awareness about mental health, and foster leadership development.

news.headline: Kaldalón hf. announces financial calendar for 2025.
news.summary: According to recent reports, a total of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the country, bringing the national tally to 50,000 infections. Additionally, there have been 20 new fatalities, raising the death toll to 1,200. The spike in cases has prompted authorities to impose stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. The healthcare system is under strain as hospitalizations continue to rise, with 500 patients currently in critical condition.Officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to prevent further escalation of the situation.

news.headline: Ensurge Micropower ASA issued 2,733,844 shares as part of the 2024 Employee Share Purchase Plan.
news.summary: Ensurge Micropower ASA recently disclosed that on March 4, 2025, they authorized the release of 2,733,844 shares as part of their 2024 Employee Share Purchase Plan.

news.headline: NEOMED's first "Giving Week" supports M.D., Pharm.D., Ph.D., and D.D.S. students from March 10-14, 2025.
news.summary: From March 10 to 14, 2025, Northeast Ohio Medical University (NEOMED) based in Cleveland is hosting its inaugural "Giving Week." NEOMED comprises four Colleges - Medicine, Pharmacy, Graduate Studies, and the Bitonte College of Dentistry. The event aims to raise awareness and support for the institution's programs, which cater to aspiring doctors, pharmacists, researchers, and dental professionals.

news.headline: Adam Burnham appointed Chief Growth Officer by AdCellerant to enhance digital advertising solutions for media partners.
news.summary: A company based in Denver, AdCellerant, is committed to enabling all businesses to access high-quality digital marketing services. On March 7, 2025, the company announced the appointment of Adam Burnham, an industry veteran, as its inaugural Chief Growth Officer. AdCellerant aims to revolutionize digital advertising services for media partners and agencies, ensuring widespread accessibility to effective marketing solutions.

news.headline: The US is likely to ban the DeepSeek chatbot from government devices - WSJ citing Sources.
White House weighs measures to curb DeepSeek over data-security concerns - WSJ citing Sources.
Climate art mural unveiling at OCPS Academic Center for Excellence in Orlando, FL on March 11 from 3:30-5:00 PM.
news.summary: On March 11, 2025, from 3:30 PM to 5:00 PM, a lively event will take place at the OCPS Academic Center for Excellence located at 701 W Livingston St, Orlando, FL 32805. The occasion involves the reveal of a colorful climate-themed mural on three walls of the school. The OCPS Academic Center for Excellence, recognized as a Title I school, will host this unveiling event in Orlando, Florida.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating WBA, IVAC, BLUE for securities law violations on behalf of shareholders.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, announced they are investigating multiple companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties. One of the companies under scrutiny is Walgreens Boots Alliance (NASDAQ: WBA). This investigation aims to address issues impacting shareholders' interests, with an emphasis on ensuring compliance and accountability in corporate governance. The probe will assess any possible violations or improper conduct that may have disadvantaged investors.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating FNA, PLYA, AMPS, ESSA for violations. Companies involved include Paragon 28, Inc. (NYSE: FNA).
news.summary: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC in New York is currently looking into various companies for possible breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. This includes Paragon 28, Inc. (NYSE: FNA), which is under investigation for its sale transaction. The law firm is examining the situation to determine if any violations have occurred and to ensure the protection of shareholders' interests.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens luxury clubhouse at Regency at Esperanza 55+ community in Boerne, Texas, with modern homes.
news.summary: A 55+ active-adult community by Toll Brothers in Boerne, Texas provides luxurious onsite amenities and modern home designs for residents.

news.headline: Energy Secretary will ask Congress for $20B to restock oil reserve.
White House Crypto Summit gathers industry leaders amid debate over US crypto policy, fueled by President Trump's Bitcoin reserve plans.
news.summary: The White House has organized a Crypto Summit which has gathered prominent industry figures. President Trump's proposal to invest in Bitcoin has ignited discussions on the direction of cryptocurrency regulations in the US.

news.headline: Trump Trade Adviser Navarro: Reciprocal tariffs will focus on one tariff rate for each country to reflect tariff and non-tariff measures.
Trump Trade Adviser Navarro ends CNBC Interview.
Trump Trade Adviser Navarro on reciprocal Tariffs: One number for each country.
Elevest Capital buys 144-unit Class B Multifamily in Charlotte as Fund 58 is completed.
news.summary: A boutique private equity firm named Elevest Capital, which focuses on multifamily real estate, has recently finalized Fund 58 by purchasing a 144-unit Class B multifamily property in Charlotte, North Carolina. The transaction marks a significant achievement for Elevest Capital in the real estate market. The deal was completed on March 7, 2025, and signifies a successful investment strategy for the firm.

news.headline: UAE's Adnoc reportedly seeking gas field deals in solid US expansion move.
Kaldalón hf. releases 2024 financial statements, reflecting strong performance. #financials2024
Rakuten Viki and Studio N to co-produce K-drama "My Girlfriend is the Man!" Debuting in 2025 as platform hits 100M users.
news.summary: In a much-anticipated move, a popular webcomic adaptation is set to make its debut in 2025 as Rakuten Viki celebrates a significant milestone of reaching 100 million registered users. The announcement was made in San Fransisco on March 7th. Rakuten Viki, known as a premier platform for Asian entertainment, continues to expand its offerings with this new addition, further solidifying its position in the market.

news.headline: InventHelp inventors create bulletproof backpack accessory called CORSO to protect against active shooters. (NJR-198)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, two inventors from Pennsauken, New Jersey, introduced the CORSO backpack with the intention of offering defense and protection during school shootings. The innovative design aims to provide a shield for students in such harrowing situations. This backpack is a response to the rising concerns over school safety and could potentially enhance security measures.

news.headline: Silver Miller offers legal help to victims of wallet exploits, focusing on Phantom and Trust Wallet.
news.summary: In Coral Springs, Florida, on March 7, 2025, Silver Miller, a top law firm specializing in cryptocurrency litigation, is addressing a concerning exploit that is affecting users of Phantom and Trust Wallet through their browser features. This exploit has led to reports of potential risks for users. Silver Miller is taking action to respond to this issue promptly.

news.headline: February jobs report shows modest hiring, excludes DOGE jobs & Trump tariffs; S&P 500 rises. Fed Chair Powell discussed.
news.summary: In February, there was moderate job growth as the month began followed by initial announcements of layoffs at DOGE. Additionally, Trump's tariffs started to take effect by the middle of the month. The latest jobs report did not include data on DOGE or the impact of tariffs. Despite this, the S&P 500 saw an increase in value, with market focus shifting to the upcoming appearance of Fed Chair Powell. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: The White House doesn't provide the theme of Trump's 11 AM remarks.
Trump is to deliver remarks at 11AM ET.
Ferrari N.V. purchases 666,666 common shares for 299,999,700 Euro in the latest share repurchase program.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Ferrari N.V. announced its participation in an accelerated bookbuild offering by Exor N.V. by acquiring 666,666 common shares at a total cost of 299,999,700 Euros. This signifies a significant investment by the Company in the recent offering.

news.headline: Park Aerospace Corp. board declares $0.125 cash dividend, payable to shareholders on May 2, 2025, record date by April 2.
news.summary: Park Aerospace Corp. (NYSE: PKE) headquartered in Newton, Kansas, announced on March 7, 2025, that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.125 per share. The dividend will be payable on May 2, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on April 2, 2025. This quarterly cash dividend reflects the company's commitment to providing value to its shareholders.

news.headline: Trump Trade Adviser Navarro: Auto companies pledged to move supply chains to the US faster as part of trade negotiations - CNBC.
Bitcoin nears $90K amid US job data boost ahead of crypto summit, with focus shifting as Strategic Reserve is set.
news.summary: With the White House Crypto Summit underway, Bitcoin experts are now focusing on US macro data. The event is drawing attention as the Strategic Reserve is reportedly already established.

news.headline: Terms set for Riksbank auctions of gov't bonds. 281 bids received, totalling SEK 45 billion.
ResearchAndMarkets.com offers report on DBS Group Holdings Ltd's tech activities, digital strategies, and technology initiatives.
news.summary: Dublin-based DBS Group Holdings Ltd's profile has been featured on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the company's tech endeavors, such as digital transformation strategies and innovation programs. DBS Group Holdings Ltd, which operates mainly through its subsidiary DBS Bank Ltd, provides diverse banking and financial services. This includes offerings like current and savings accounts. The report sheds light on the company's technology initiatives.

Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 34/100 = Fear
Stocks set for worst week in months amid trade tensions, concerns over economic growth and tariffs on US trading partners.
news.summary: Concerns are rising among investors regarding the impact of tariffs on the economic growth of the United States and its major trading partners. This unease stems from uncertainties surrounding the potential consequences of the tariffs, with significant implications on global trade relationships and financial markets. The apprehension is driven by the sheer magnitude of the tariffs involved, as well as the potential for retaliatory measures from affected countries. These uncertainties have led to a sense of caution and anxiety in the investment community as they monitor the evolving situation and its potential ramifications on the global economy.

news.headline: U.S. Treasury Secretary describes tariffs as a 'one-time' price adjustment to address trade disparities. Positive economic indicators include a 15% decline in energy prices since inauguration.
news.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent discussed tariffs as a temporary price correction during an interview before the White House Crypto Summit. He highlighted the administration's trade strategy targeting global trade imbalances through measures like addressing currency manipulation and subsidies. Bessent emphasized that tariffs were a one-time adjustment, mentioning positive economic trends since the inauguration, including a 15% decrease in energy prices and crude oil, lower mortgage rates, and an increase in... (the rest of the information is available on Benzinga.com).

news.headline: Fed's Bowman: Shocks and structural changes since the COVID-19 pandemic may have masked transmission of Fed policy to the economy.
Fed's Bowman: The neutral rate likely has risen since the pandemic.
BioNTech to release earnings on March 10, analysts expect quarterly earnings at 25 cents/share, revenue at $1.15B. BioNTech shares fell 3.4% to close at $110.83.
news.summary: BioNTech SE (NASDAQ:BNTX) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on March 10, before the market opens. Analysts anticipate earnings of $0.25 per share, a decrease from $1.90 per share in the same quarter last year. Revenue is projected to be $1.15 billion, down from $1.48 billion last year. Concurrently, the FDA has placed a clinical hold on BioNTech's IND application for their RNA-based vaccine for P. falciparum malaria. Following this news, BioNTech's shares closed at $110.83, a 3.4% decline. For more details, including analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's website.

news.headline: Inventor from Stockton, N.J introduces FUNNEL BUCKET for loader buckets to prevent overspills in construction work.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, an inventor from Stockton, New Jersey shared the inspiration behind his creation, the FUNNEL BUCKET. The inventor, who works in construction, recognized the need for a more accurate method to dump loads using a loader bucket to avoid overspills. This innovative design aims to eliminate the manual labor involved in the process.

news.headline: Breast Lesion Localization Market to reach USD 560.17M by 2032 with 5.9% CAGR globally: Verified Market Research®.
news.summary: A well-known provider of business intelligence and market analysis, Verified Market Research®, has recently launched a detailed report on the Breast Lesion Localization Market. This in-depth study offers valuable insights into the changing market trends and is highly authoritative. The report covers a wide range of important statistics and data, providing actionable information for businesses operating in this sector.

news.headline: Pharmacy Automation Market to reach US$10.00 billion by 2030, growing at 7.1% CAGR from US$6.23 billion in 2023.
news.summary: In March 7, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported that the worldwide Pharmacy Automation Market, previously valued at US$6.23 billion in 2023, is anticipated to exhibit a steady rise with a robust Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.1%. The market is projected to reach US$6.65 billion in 2024 and is forecasted to reach an impressive US$10.00 billion by the year 2030. The growth of this market is primarily driven by...

news.headline: Pinstripes to receive additional capital from Oaktree for growth and operations under new letter of intent.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois - Pinstripes Holdings, Inc. (OTC: PNST) revealed today their agreement with Oaktree Capital Management, L.P., regarding a binding letter of intent. This agreement involves funds managed by Oaktree, which represents the majority of Pinstripes' outstanding debt. Pinstripes, a renowned experiential dining and entertainment brand that offers a mix of bistro, bowling, bocce, and private event space, confirmed the details of the deal. This development signifies a significant move for both parties involved.
